item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- New York Rangers – 71 pts (0.316) Carolina Hurricanes – 100 pts (0.45) Buffalo Sabres – 100 pts (0.444) Tampa Bay Lightning – 98 pts (0.441) Montreal Canadiens – 96 pts (0.432) Boston Bruins – 94 pts (0.418) Pittsburgh Penguins – 92 pts (0.409) New York Islanders – 89 pts (0.39) Columbus Blue Jackets – 88 pts (0.391) Ottawa Senators – 86 pts (0.387) Detroit Red Wings – 86 pts (0.387) Philadelphia Flyers – 86 pts (0.387) Washington Capitals – 85 pts (0.378) New Jersey Devils – 78 pts (0.351) Toronto Maple Leafs – 77 pts (0.342) Florida Panthers – 75 pts (0.338) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
